creator: scf@FreeBSD.org
text:
I tested the patch with the original version (non Anthology).  I found a few issues to fix:
- A missing STAGEDIR.
- Using STAT instead of /usr/bin/stat
- Continue to replace the libSDL that comes with UT.  Nvidia needs it.  It merely links to the system install of the Linux libSDL.

I can commit it or xmj@ if he wishes to take maintainership of the port.
